# Kuip Limited

> Infrastructure for verifiable digital systems.

Kuip Limited builds blockchain infrastructure, WebAssembly execution systems, cryptographic protocols, and distributed computing systems.

## Primary Capabilities

- Blockchain infrastructure design and implementation
- WebAssembly-based execution environments
- Cryptographic protocols and proof systems
- Deterministic execution environments
- Ethereum Virtual Machine and Cosmos SDK engineering
- High-performance data architectures

## Selected Work

- wasmX: https://wasmx.provable.dev/
- Provable: https://provable.dev/

Provable is high-throughput cryptographic integrity infrastructure for time ordered data streams, with nanosecond precision.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.kuip.co.uk/
- Email: founder@kuip.co.uk
- Company: Kuip Limited, Ireland CRO 570321
